summary: When diffusion_prompt is a list with more than one element, the orchestrator silently falls through; add an explicit error branch or verify that mammoth_moda2.ar2dit never returns multi-element lists.
The logger.info call uses len(generated_token_ids) which may be None; change to len(generated_token_ids or []) for defensive safety.
Update docstring to explain that when prompt is a list, only the first element is used, matching the single-request contract.
The test unnecessarily wraps prompt in a list; pass the fake prompt directly to align with the production calling convention.
The fallback chain uses 'or' which can leak raw text when cumulative_text is an empty string; use 'cumulative_text if cumulative_text is not None else ...' to properly prefer the accumulated field.
The prompt normalization block is now identical to the GLM-Image bridge; consider extracting into a shared helper to prevent future drift.
